sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53828" key="katagrupo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταγρῡπόω</orth>, <sense id="n53828.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">curl the nose</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐστηρὸν καὶ κατεγρυπωμένον</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scornful</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.753c</biblScope> </bibl> codd. (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατεγνυπωμένον</foreign> Schneid.).</sense> </entryFree>
